Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class WebViewOverlayHost

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.dll

Manages a transparent companion window for rendering Avalonia controls above a WebView. Uses a real borderless Avalonia Avalonia.Controls.Window as a child of the parent window, positioned to exactly cover the WebView bounds.

public sealed class WebViewOverlayHost : IDisposable
Inheritance
object
WebViewOverlayHost
Implements
IDisposable

Properties

Bounds

DPI-adjusted bounds of the overlay (screen physical pixels).

public Rect Bounds { get; }

Property Value

Rect

Content

The Avalonia visual to render in the overlay. Setting this updates the overlay window's content in real time.

public object? Content { get; set; }

Property Value

object

DpiScale

Current DPI scale factor applied to bounds.

public double DpiScale { get; }

Property Value

double

HasKeyboardFocus

Whether the overlay currently has keyboard focus.

public bool HasKeyboardFocus { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsVisible

Whether the overlay is currently visible.

public bool IsVisible { get; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

HitTest(double, double)

Hit-tests a point to determine whether it should be handled by the overlay or passed through.

public OverlayHitTestResult HitTest(double x, double y)

Parameters

x double
y double

Returns

OverlayHitTestResult

SyncVisibilityWith(bool)

Syncs overlay visibility with the WebView visibility.

public void SyncVisibilityWith(bool isVisible)

Parameters

isVisible bool

TransferFocusToOverlay()

Transfers keyboard focus from WebView to overlay.

public void TransferFocusToOverlay()

TransferFocusToWebView()

Transfers keyboard focus from overlay to WebView.

public void TransferFocusToWebView()
